prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the same person and the same blue polo shirt, but transform the casual poolside selfie into a clean professional studio head-and-shoulders portrait. Remove the entire outdoor resort background and replace it with a solid warm orange backdrop. Reframe the shot so the subject is centered, facing the camera straight-on, cropped from mid-chest upward, with even soft studio lighting and a sharp, polished photo quality. Eliminate the selfie feel, background distractions, and other people, and add a small white four-point sparkle icon in the bottom-right corner.
translatedPrompt: 使用提供的参考图像，保持人物和蓝色 Polo 衫不变，将随意的泳池边自拍转化为干净、专业的影棚半身肖像。移除整个户外度假村背景，并将其替换为纯暖橙色背景。重新构图，使主体居中，正对镜头，裁剪范围从胸部中部向上，采用均匀柔和的影棚布光，呈现清晰、精致的照片质感。消除自拍感、背景干扰和其他人物，并在右下角添加一个白色四角星形图标。

breakdown.creativeCore: 将度假自拍转化为影棚级肖像：此提示词可将随意的参考自拍转化为居中的专业影棚风格肖像，适用于个人资料照片或精致的个人品牌形象。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
